title: Bass with French Pilaf and Sea Garlic
description: A flavorful and aromatic Mexican-inspired dish featuring bass, pilaf, and a hint of sea garlic.
instructions: 2. Season bass fillets with salt and pepper.
3. In a pan, melt 1 tbsp of garlicky butter over medium heat.
4. Add the bass fillets and sear for 2-3 minutes.
5. Transfer the pan to the oven and bake for 8-10 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, cook the French pilaf according to package instructions.
7. Heat the remaining 1 tbsp of garlicky butter in a pan over medium heat.
8. Add the velvety sea garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
9. Serve the baked bass on top of the French pilaf with a drizzle of sea garlic sauce.
10. Garnish with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
